qa_pairs.question: What modules are required to run GROMACS version 2020.4 on GPUs with CUDA 11.4 in the StdEnv/2020 environment, and what are its notes?
qa_pairs.answer: To run GROMACS 2020.4 on GPUs with CUDA 11.4 in the StdEnv/2020 environment, you need to load `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 cuda/11.4 openmpi/4.0.3 gromacs/2020.4`. This version uses GCC, FlexiBLAS & FFTW and has a warning associated with it.

qa_pairs.question: What modules are needed for GROMACS version 2020.4 on CPUs in the StdEnv/2020 environment, and what are its notes?
qa_pairs.answer: For GROMACS 2020.4 on CPUs in the StdEnv/2020 environment, load `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 openmpi/4.0.3 gromacs/2020.4`. This version uses GCC & MKL and has a warning associated with it.

qa_pairs.answer: To run GROMACS 2020.4 on GPUs with CUDA 11.0 in the StdEnv/2020 environment, load `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 cuda/11.0 openmpi/4.0.3 gromacs/2020.4`. This version uses GCC & MKL and has a warning associated with it.

qa_pairs.question: Is the StdEnv/2018.3 software environment still supported?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the StdEnv/2018.3 software environment is no longer supported.

qa_pairs.answer: For GROMACS 2020.2 on CPUs in the StdEnv/2018.3 environment, the modules are `StdEnv/2018.3 gcc/7.3.0 openmpi/3.1.2 gromacs/2020.2`. This version uses GCC & MKL.
